name: Lodgify Vacation Rental API
what_it_does: Lodgify REST API for vacation rental management platform combining website builder, booking engine, and channel manager. Enables AI agents to manage property listings, sync availability across OTA channels (Airbnb, VRBO, Booking.com), process direct bookings, handle guest inquiries, manage pricing calendars, and integrate rental data with operations and payment systems.
use_cases: Managing property availability and pricing across OTA channels from distribution agents
Processing direct bookings from AI-driven booking concierge agents
Automating guest inquiry responses from hospitality automation agents
Syncing reservation data with operations tools from property management agents
not_for: Large enterprise property management without boutique rental focus
Hotel chain management without vacation rental workflows
Commercial real estate without short-term rental operations
best_when: A vacation rental property owner or small manager wants AI agents to automate multi-channel distribution, handle guest inquiries, and manage booking workflows across their property portfolio.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Guest booking data is subject to OTA platform data agreements. Automated communication must comply with channel-specific terms.

auth.notes: Lodgify uses API key authentication via X-ApiKey header. API keys are account-scoped. No granular scope control — full account access per key.

pricing.free_tier_limits: 14-day free trial; no permanent free tier
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter, Professional, and Ultimate plans based on property count and features
pricing.notes: Spanish company (Barcelona). Focus on independent hosts and small property managers. Includes website builder with direct booking capabilities.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer docs

known_agent_gotchas: No public MCP server — REST API with API key header auth
No granular scopes — API key grants full account access
Spanish/EU company — GDPR compliance; EU data residency
No idempotency — avoid duplicate booking submissions
OTA channel sync conflicts require careful deduplication logic
Smaller developer community than enterprise PMS — less community support
agent_readiness.security_notes: Guest booking data. GDPR. EU data residency. API key with no granular scopes — treat as full account credential.

security_score_components.security_notes: Guest booking data. GDPR. EU data residency. API key only, no scopes.
